titleStmt.title: SII 5.644: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 644. (A.R. No. 84 of 1895). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tirumātar puviyenum perumātar I
var tan māteviyarkaḷāka mitoḷir veṇkuṭai yuyar
ttu tiṇkali peyarttu tan ciṟiyatātaiyākiya peruva
li kaṅkaikoṇṭacoḻaṉai poṅkikal Irumaṭicoḻana
Enṟu porumuraṭṭaṉ ṟiruttampiyartammuḷ venṟikoḷ mum
maṭicoḻaṉai temmuṉai yaṭutiṟaṟ coḻapāṇṭiyaneṉṟuṅ
ṟoṭukaḻal viracoḻaṉai paṭipukaḻ karikālacoḻanenṟum porutoḻil vā
ḷvali taṭakkai maturāntakaṉai coḻakaṅkanenṟum tayarak kāṭanṟiruvuḷatta
npoṭu karutu kātalar tammuḷ Ittalam pukaḻ rājentra coḻaṉai Uttamacoḻa
nenṟum tottaṇi mukaiyavi ḻalaṅkal muṭikoṇṭacoḻaṉai Ikal vicaiyālai
yaneṟṟum pukarmukattoḻilmiku kaḷiṟṟu coḻakeraḷaṉai vārcilai coḻakeraḷanen
ṟu tiṇṭiṟaṟ kaṭāraṅkoṇṭacoḻaṉai tinakarakulattu ciṟappamar coḻajanakarāja- nenṟu
m kaṉaikaḻal paṭikoṇṭa palapukaḻ muṭikoṇṭacoḻaṉai cun=ta racoḻanenṟu cen=ta- mi
ḻ piṭiya liraṭṭapāṭikoṇṭacoḻaṉai tolpuviyāḷuṭai coḻakannakucci- rā ja nenṟu
nta n kātalartammuḷ metaku katirāṅ kaṉaikaḻal maturān=ta kaṉai velpaṭai coḻavalla
panenṟu mānaccilaikkai Orāṉaic cevakaṉai nirupenti yacoḻanenṟu parumaṇicuṭar neṭumakuṭam cūṭṭi pa
ṭimikai nikaḻum nāḷinuḷ Ikal veṭṭeḻun tu cenṟoṇṭiṟal Iraṭṭamaṇṭala meyti natikaḷum nāṭum
patikaḷum Anekam Aḻittanan vaḷavanenṉum moḻiporuḷ keṭṭu vekaveñcaḷu kki Āhavamal
lan paripavam Eṟ kiten ṟeriviḻit teḻun tu cepporun=ti ratta koppattakavaiyi luṭan ṟetireṉṟamar
tuṭaṅkiyapoḻu tavan ceñcaramāri tan kuñcaramukattilum kunṟu ṟaḻ puyattilum
tan ṟiruttuṭaiyilum taiykkavum tannuṭan(ka) kaḷiṟeṟiya toṭukaḻal virar maṭiyavum vakaiyura
torutaniyanekam porupaṭai vaḻaṅki Ammoympamar caḷukki tampi cayaciṅkanum poṟ pulike
ciyum tār tacapanmanum mānamannavaril maṇṭali Acokaiyanum Āna vaṇpukaḻ Āḷum Āraiyanu
m tenivar maṭṭavi ḻalaṅkal moṭṭayanum kiṭṭiya nanninuḷampanum Enumivar mutalinar Eṇṇi
li Araicarai viṇṇakat teṟṟi vanniya revanum vayappaṭait tuttanuṅ konnavil paṭai kuṇṭamanu
m Enṟina veñcinavaraicaro ṭañciya caḷukki kulakulain tu talaimayir virittu mennuṟa neḷittu pinnuṟa
nokki kālpaṟi n=to ṭi melkaṭal pāya turatti Appotaccerukkaḷat tavanviṭucatturupayaṅkarak karapat
tiramutaṟ pattirajāti pakaṭṭarai canekamum meṭṭunaṭaip parikaḷu
m Oṭṭakaniraikaḷum varākavelkoṭi mutal rājappariccan=ta mum Oppi
ya caṭṭiavvai Anukappai Ēnṟivar mutaṟṟeviyar kuḻāmum pā
vaiya riṭṭamum Eṉaiyana piṟavu muṉaivaiyiṟ koṇṭu tenṟi
kai Akavaiyiṟ poṟpaṭai naṭātti kārkaṭal Ila(kai)ṅkaiyil miṭaṟ
paṭaik kaliṅkarman viracalāmekaṉai kaṭarkkatak kaḷiṟṟoṭum paṭa katirmuṭi taṭivi
t tetilav vilaṅkaikkiṟaivan māpparaṇan kātala riruvarai kaḷattiṭaip
piṭittu māpperum pukaḻ mika vaḷartta kopparakecarivanmarā na Uṭaiyār śrī- rā
jentra tevaṟku yāṇṭu 8 Āvatu rājentra ciṅkavaḷanāṭṭu poykaināṭṭu tevatānam tiruma
ḻuvāṭiyuṭaiyār tevarkani kaḷom pūrva tecam kaṅkaiyum kiṭāramum koṇṭaruḷina Uṭaiyār
śrīrājentra coḻatevar Aṇukkiyar Aiyyāṟan cempon taṅkaikkūttan Uttamaciliyār
makanār ciṟutanapperuntaram senāpati AraiyanRead kiṭāraṅ.kaṭakkaṅkoṇṭacoḻan rājarāja Aṇimu
rināṭāḻvār tirumaḻuvāṭiuṭaiyaār koyilil cempu tarāvāl Eḻun=ta ruḷuvitta tirumeni [po
nnār]meniyākku tiruvamutukku nāḷ Onṟukku tiruvamutu Arici kuṟuṇi nānāḻikku Aiñciraṇṭu
vaṇṇam nellu mukkuṟuṇi Aṟunāḻiyum kaṟiyamutukku nellu munnāḻiyum neyyamutu Iruce
viṭaraikku nellu Irunāḻiyum tayiramutu nāḻi Urikku nellu munnāḻiyum Aṭaikkāyamutukku veṟuṅkā
y Āṟukkum veṟṟilai 10 2 kkum nellu nāḻiyum tiruvamutu ponakappānai Onṟukkum kaṟiyamutu caṭṭi Onṟukku
m muṭkala Iraṇṭukkum Āka Uru nālukku nellu nāḻiyum tirunun=tā viḷakku Onṟukku Eṇṇai Uḻakku
kku nellu kuṟuṇiyum Āka nāḷ Onṟukku nellu tūṇip patakkāka nāḷ 3 100- ṟṟaṟupatukku nellu nūṟ
ṟeṇpatin kalattukku veli nūṟu varicaiyāka veṇṭum nilam Onṟe mukkāle Orumāvukku nāṅkaḷ viṟṟu
kuṭutta nilamāvatu cempiyanmātevippererikiḻ rā jarājanvāykkālukku vaṭakkum kucavar nilattukku meṟ
kum tirumeykāppār nilattukku kiḻakkum paḷḷattil nilam Orumāvum Itan vaṭakku piḷḷaiyār Uttama
coḻatevar nampirāṭṭiyār Araiyan jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻiyārāna pañcavanmāteviyār vaitta tirununnā viḷakku
kku viṭṭa nilattukku kiḻakkum vaṭakkil vāykkālukku teṟkum Uvaiccan kuṟumpan tirumaḻuvāṭi nilattukku mekkum kaṇa
vati nettānan nilattukkum kucavar nilattukku vaṭakkum nila mākāṇiyum Ittirunun=tā viḷakku nilattukku meṟkum
tirumeykāppān Araiyan Aḻakiyacoḻan nilattukku vaṭakkil kiḻaimelāna peruvarampukku vaṭakkum cempiya
mātevippererikku kiḻakkum vaṭakkil tūmpil ninṟum kiḻakkunokkina vāykkālukku teṟkum Ā
ka nilam Iraṇṭumāk kāṇiyum Āka Ivvicaitta perunān kellaiyilum Akappaṭṭanilam nā
nmā varai Innilam nānmā varaiyināl Onṟeṭṭākka tiruvulaka
ḷantapaṭi nilam Onṟey mukkāle Orumāvum viṟṟukuṭuttu Inni
lattukku vilaiyāka tevarpaṇṭārattu Ivar Oṭukkina kācu Eḻupatu I
kkācu Eḻupatuṅ koṇṭu Innilattāl vanta neṟ koṇṭu Itte
varkku Innivan=ta ñ ceytapaṭi Innivantañ celuttakaṭavomānom tiruma
ḻuvāṭiyuṭaiyār de varkanmi kaḷom Ivai śrīkoyiṟ kaṇakku neṟkuppai Uṭaiyān
paṭṭālakan rājentra coḻan Ivai En neḻuttu parikalam veṇkala taḷikai 1 nāl niṟai
4 ṟpattu Eḻupalam veṇkala vaṭṭil 1 nāl niṟai Aimpalam veṇkala caṭa
ṭuvam 1 nāl niṟai Aimpalam tarā kaṟikkāl 1 nāl niṟai Aimpatu tarā vaṭṭilkāl 1 ni
ṟai muppalam Aiñcā ṇiḷattu viḷakku Iraṇṭu Irumpum maṇṇum nikki tarā 3 100 ṟṟu pa
lam tirukkaḻuttukku cātta muttuvaṭam 1 muttu 2 10 6 pavaḻam rājavandha m kokkuvāyum pa
ṭukaṇṇum kotta nūl caraṭu Uḷpaṭa niṟai mukkaḻañce mukkālum muttin
pūṇnūl 3 nāl nūl caraṭu Uḷpaṭa niṟai 10 2 kaḻañce Iraṇṭu mañcāṭiyum kunṟi
tirukkātil cāttum koḷponṟināl kaṇṭum ponnu muḷpaṭa niṟai Araikkaḻañce Iraṇṭu
mañcāṭiyum kunṟi tirukkaikāṟai nālum tiruvaṭikāṟai yiraṇṭum niṟai pon patināṟ kaḻañ carai
ye yiraṇṭu mañcāṭiyum kunṟi Ivaiyiṟṟil kotta muttum nūlum ceppāṇi panniraṇṭum Uḷpa
ṭa niṟai nāṟpattu nāṟkaḻañ caraiyum muttukuṭai Onṟinil cuḻal tūkkal Uḷḷiṭṭu kottu nūṟcaraṭu
Uḷpaṭa muttu niṟai 7 10- tin kaḻañcu cempil pon pūcina makuṭam 1 paḷḷitoṅkal makuṭam ce
mpinmel pon pūcina makuṭam 3 paḷḷicivikai 1 melpaṭiyār tammaiyāka ceyta cempu
tarāvāl prathi ma 1 � kaḷa Itu panmā heśvara rakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 5.644 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
